title: pinus monophylla var. californiarum
intro: Pinus monophylla var. californiarum, also known as California single-leaf pinyon, is a variety of pine tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The resin and needles of Pinus monophylla var. californiarum have been used to treat various health issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats, as well as to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and boost the immune system.
